current_public_release.license_boundary: Prior Apache-2.0 public distribution remains licensed; privacy does not revoke prior public rights.

website.verification_hint: Verify the live public checkpoint through static zlar.ai artifacts: release.json, the proof-pack manifest, SHA256SUMS, verifier, and coverage report. Current core source is private.

authority_boundary: A log records what happened. A ZLAR receipt records what counted as authorized effect when action tried to become consequence.

claim_boundary.summary: Current public site explains the category, side-door boundary, and receipt-scanner proof surface. Detailed current core source and CI evidence are private; public verification is static zlar.ai metadata and proof-pack artifacts.
claim_boundary.evidence_threshold: v3.4.54 - Scoped Claude Code pre-authority install readiness remains the current public release checkpoint. Public verification is the static zlar.ai receipt-scanner path: release.json, proof-pack-manifest.json, SHA256SUMS, verifier, and coverage report. Prior Apache-2.0 public distribution remains licensed; current core source access is private and source review is by request. This metadata does not claim public GitHub inspection, public clone/install access, public CI visibility, current-machine governance, live hook execution, live receipt emission, production authority, enterprise readiness, external attestation, sovereign recognition, or unrouted-surface coverage.
claim_boundary.safe_codex_wording: ZLAR can govern Codex CLI-invoked MCP tool calls when those MCP servers are routed through ZLAR.
non_claims: No public GitHub inspection claim for current core source.
No public clone or install path claim.

source_boundary: Prior Apache-2.0 public distribution remains licensed. Current core source access is private. Public verification uses static zlar.ai artifacts, not the private core GitHub repository.
